order_number.orig_str: शासन शुध्दीपत्रक क्रमांकः सुप्रमा-२०२४/प्र.क्र.१९६/ पापु ९३ (E Office No १११६१६९)

para_trans: Under the "Jal Jeevan Mission Programme," Md. Ramnagar and Kalonwadi.
Regarding grant of revised administrative approval to the budget of the tap water supply scheme.
Government Corrigendum No: Suprama-2024 / Q. No.116 / Pap 93 (E Office No.1116169) 7th Floor, Gokuldas Tejpal Hospital Complex,
Lokmanya Tilak Marg, Mantralaya, Mumbai - Yoo 0019
Government Decision No.Suprama-2024 / P.No.196 / Papu 13, D. 28.05.2025

Under the "Jal Jeevan Mission," Dr. Ramnagar and Kalonwadi. Chikhali Tap Water Supply Scheme is under the purview of the Department. The price in line 4 of the Government Decision dated 28.05.2025 is Rs. 1,57,03, 100 / - (Rupees One Crore Fifty Seven Lakh Three Thousand Hundred Only) instead of "Rs." 145.63 lakh (Rupees one crore forty-five lakh sixty-three thousand) "should be read as" only. "
The decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
